SessionStart.command: echo 'CAVEMAN MODE ACTIVE. Rules: Drop articles/filler/pleasantries/hedging. Fragments OK. Short synonyms. Pattern: [thing] [action] [reason]. [next step]. Code/commits/security: write normal. Read AGENTS.md, prd.md, docs/visual-backlog.md, docs/route-acceptance.md. One product task per round. Tests/VRT green != done. If PRD empty, stop unless one evidence-backed new task. If Figma incomplete or inconsistent: implement smallest coherent continuation, log inference, update PRD only with evidence. Worklog: short, clear, include action/finding/error/next. User says stop caveman or normal mode to deactivate.'
